    1. EpisodeRoleSummary(double, double, double, double, double, double[], double[])

クラス EpisodeRoleSummary

java.lang.Object
mechanics.rl.EpisodeRoleSummary
public class EpisodeRoleSummary extends Object
Episode-level summary comparing realized role usage against expected static role priors.

  • フィールドの概要

    フィールド
    修飾子とタイプ
    フィールド
    説明
    final double
    carryAlignmentScore
    Alignment score for the carry/DPS role.
    static final int
    DAMAGE_SHARE
    Feature index for total-damage share.
    static final int
    ENTRY_SHARE
    Feature index for on-entry damage share.
    final double
    entryAlignmentScore
    Alignment score for entry timing.
    final double[]
    expectedRoleVector
    Expected (prior) role vector, length VECTOR_SIZE.
    static final int
    FEATURES_PER_SLOT
    Number of features tracked per party slot.
    static final int
    OFF_FIELD_DAMAGE_SHARE
    Feature index for off-field damage share.
    final double
    offFieldAlignmentScore
    Alignment score for off-field roles.
    static final int
    ON_FIELD_SHARE
    Feature index for time-on-field share.
    final double[]
    realizedRoleVector
    Realized role vector observed during the episode.
    final double
    roleAlignmentScore
    Overall role alignment score.
    static final int
    STAY_SHARE
    Feature index for stay-time share after entry.
    final double
    stayAlignmentScore
    Alignment score for on-field stay duration.
    static final int
    VECTOR_SIZE
    Flattened vector size for the per-slot role summary.

    説明

    Constructs an episode role summary.

      Realized role vector observed during the episode.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • EpisodeRoleSummary

      public EpisodeRoleSummary(double roleAlignmentScore, double carryAlignmentScore, double offFieldAlignmentScore, double entryAlignmentScore, double stayAlignmentScore, double[] expectedRoleVector, double[] realizedRoleVector)
      Constructs an episode role summary.
      パラメータ:
      roleAlignmentScore - overall alignment score
      carryAlignmentScore - carry-role alignment
      offFieldAlignmentScore - off-field-role alignment
      entryAlignmentScore - entry-timing alignment
      stayAlignmentScore - on-field-stay alignment
      expectedRoleVector - expected role feature vector
      realizedRoleVector - realized role feature vector
